title: Go to diamond — peak-COVID 17yo polymath sprint
html:
TL;DR

  • Sprawling April 2020 to-do dump showing peak-COVID Yahir at 17: stock watchlists (beyond meat, planet fitness, Trade Desk, Emerson Electric, "Buffalo Disco Rey fund"), Amazon FBA prep, mini pet mart job interview, marketing-agency cold-outreach plans, AP school work, and "learn AI" as a recurring TODO.
  • Contains the lifelong Charlie-Munger maxims: "Go where they ain't", "What's within your circle of competence?", "If we knew the answer, it wouldn't be the most important question" — quoting the value investing cannon at age 17.
  • Custodial TD Ameritrade account being opened with mom (Iracema), references to "1987 crash" / "reconstruction of civil warfare" / "Gini coefficient" / Matt Ridley book on human innovation.
  • Closing line is a perfect specimen of his image-rich self-talk: "Life sometimes feels like jump roping in your driveway, when there's a large ass rv in the middle of it."
  • Multiple mini-pet-mart interview prep notes — first documented job-interview prep in the corpus.

Key quotes

"'Go where they ain't'"

"What's within your circle of competence? / Is it knowable and is it important"

"Life sometimes feels like jump roping in your driveway, when theres a large ass rv in the middle of it"

"Gain competitive advantage by learning about ai and making useful for all / Think beginning of internet with aol and computers only for spreadsheets"

Why it matters in the graph

  • The 2020 "learn AI" TODO is the second documented AI-interest data point (first being 2019 11 13 coding zeal). This is the seed of yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026 — when he eventually built rankett he was returning to a 6-year-old open loop.
  • The Beyond Meat / Planet Fitness / Trade Desk watchlist confirms the value investing orientation. Beyond Meat already has an entity page from earlier ingest; this is the second mention.
  • The "drop resume to USave" / "mini pet mart" cluster is the proto-version of the bridge income strategies pattern that recurs in 2025 09 23 how im scraping by.
  • "Restaurant marketing" reappears as a recurring side-quest theme.

Open questions

  • Did the TD Ameritrade custodial account ever get opened? Trades from this watchlist?
  • "Buffalo Disco Rey fund, Dave Carlsen" — who's Dave Carlsen and what's the Disco Rey fund?
  • Did he land the mini-pet-mart job? (Per 2025 10 20 quality resume, yes — Lead Sales Rep, May–Aug 2020.)

Wikilinks

beyond meat · planet fitness · value investing · bridge income strategies · covid pandemic era · grants pass teen era · yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026 · yebw · grants pass or · yahir family
